title: Amtech S1878 Set of Glitter Glue Gun Sticks in 6 Colours, 30 pieces 11x100mm for Hot Melt Crafting, Decorating and Bonding
features: Ideal Product: The Amtech hot melt glue sticks for glue gun are ideal for crafting, decorating, and bonding objects. Also, great to use these 11mm glue sticks for creative card making, art and craft, as well as, holiday decorations.
Size: 30 pieces included in this pack of glitter hot melt glue gun sticks 11mm x 100mm in size.
Colours Available: 6 coloured glue gun sticks are included, in green, silver, red, yellow, blue and purple. These colours are the most radiant and popular selection for creative usage.

Compatible With: This Glitter Glue gun sticks are compatible with Amtech 10W glue gun (stock code S1860), Amtech 50W glue gun (stock code S1850), and Amtech 35-80W cordless glue gun (stock S1845). You can also use these coloured glue gun sticks with any glue gun brand that accepts a diameter of 7mm or 11mm glue sticks
Caution: Please do not touch the glue gun's nozzle or any hot melted glue during usage or application.
description: The Amtech hot melt Glitter Glue Gun Sticks are quick setting and can be used for a variety of creative arts and crafts, including decorative card making and creating colourful hair accessories. You can also use the 11mm glue sticks for aspirational decorating and bonding purposes. The set includes 30 pieces of 6 different popular colours, which are silver, red, green, yellow, purple and blue. All 11mm x 100mm in size and compatible with Amtech S1860 10W glue gun, Amtech S1850 50W glue gun and Amtech S1845 35-80W Cordless Glue Gun. Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your hobby & craft requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service-see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products
